tables: Haryana HPSC PGT Teacher Computer Science Recruitment 2026 Result

Haryana Public Service Commission HPSC. HPSC has issued an Post Graduate Teacher PGT Computer SCience Notification 2026. Those Candidate Are Enrolled with Vacancy Can Download Admit Card . For Recruitment details, pay scale, age limit, selection prcedure, job information and all other information, read the advertisement and then apply.
Haryana Public Service Commission (HPSC) Haryana Post Graduate Teacher PGT Computer Science Recruitment 2026 HPSC PGT Advt No. : 23/2026 | Short Details of Notification WWW.SARKARIRESULT.COM

Important Dates Application Begin : 16/02/2026 Last Date for Apply Online : 09/03/2026 Upto 05 PM Pay Exam Fee Last Date : 09/03/2026 Exam Date : 17/05/2026 Admit Card Available : 12/05/2026 Result Available : 04/07/2026
Application Fee Male General : 1000/- Haryana Reserve Category : 250/- All Category Female : 250/- PH (Divyang) : 0/- Pay the Exam Fee Through Debit Card, Credit Card, Net Banking

Haryana HPSC PGT Computer Science Notification 2026 : Age Limit as on 09/03/2026 Minimum Age : 18 Years. Maximum Age : 42 Years. Age Relaxation Extra as per Haryana Public Service Commission HPSC PGT Computer Science Recruitment Rules 2026.
HPSC PGT Computer Science Teacher Exam 2026: Vacancy Details Total : 1672 Post
HPSC Haryana PGT Computer Science Eligibility
Master Degree M.Sc Computer Science / MCA / BE / B.Tech in Computer Science / Computer Engineering / IT with 55% Marks. HTET / STET Passed. For Subject Wise Eligibility Details Read Notification.
HPSC PGT Computer Science Recruitment 2026: Category Wise Vacancy Details

How to Fill HPSC PGT Computer Science Recruitment 2026 Online Form Haryana Public Service Commission HPSC Latest Post Graduate Teacher PGT Computer Science Subject Recruitment Advt No 26/2026 Candidate Can Apply Between 16/02/2026 to 09/03/2026. Candidate Read the Notification Before Apply the Recruitment Application Form in Haryana Post Graduate Teacher Computer Science Recruitment Online Form 2026. Kindly Check and Collect the All Document – Eligibility, ID Proof, Address Details, Basic Details. Kindly Ready Scan Document Related to Recruitment Form – Photo, Sign, ID Proof, Etc. Before Submit the Application Form Must Check the Preview and All Column Carefully. If Candidate Required to Paying the Application Fee Must Submit. If You have Not the Required Application Fees Your Form is Not Completed. Take A Print Out of Final Submitted Form.
Interested Candidates Can Read the Full Notification Before Apply Online.
